title: User can sign in / log in to the platform
description: Users need to be able to sign in to the ReUse platform using their ITESO credentials. The system should validate their credentials, create a secure session, and redirect them to their dashboard. This is a critical feature that enables access to all platform functionality including publishing items, making exchanges, and managing their profile.

context.user_type: ITESO community member (student, faculty, or staff)
context.security_requirements: OAuth 2.0 / SAML integration with ITESO SSO

acceptance_criteria: User can enter their ITESO credentials (username and password)
System validates credentials against ITESO authentication service
Upon successful authentication, user is redirected to dashboard
System creates secure session with appropriate timeout
Failed login attempts are logged and displayed with clear error messages
Account lockout after multiple failed attempts
Remember me option for trusted devices

technical_considerations.security: HTTPS only, CSRF protection, rate limiting
